title: Phyllanthus acidissimus
taxonomy: Phyllanthus acidissimus is classified in the family Phyllanthaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the Phyllanthus family or the greenbrier family. This family is part of the larger order Malpighiales in the clade Rosids. Phyllanthus acidissimus is also a member of the genus Phyllanthus, which contains around 1000 species of plants. The classification of Phyllanthus acidissimus is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small flowers and distinctive fruit. Overall, the classification of Phyllanthus acidissimus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the family Phyllanthaceae.
